name: caligo-website
description: Informational, bilingual website for Caligo: Genomes of Neotropical butterflies and moths.

scripts.test:nav: node scripts/verify-nav.mjs && node scripts/verify-rendered-tokens.mjs && node scripts/verify-no-pilots-links.mjs && node scripts/verify-internal-links.mjs && node scripts/verify-list-order.mjs && node scripts/verify-projects-media.mjs
